reviews.author: Jakub Kicinski
reviews.summary: Reported spinlock contention in the rx path of cgroup_file_notify() after a specific commit, leading to the development of this patch series.

reviews.author: Shakeel Butt
reviews.summary: Posted a follow-up reply to address the changes since v1, specifically moving rate-limiting code out of the lock.

2026-03-11.patch_summary: This patch series aims to improve the scalability of cgroup_file_notify() by reducing lock hold time, adding lockless fast-path checks, and replacing a global spinlock with per-cgroup_file locks.
